calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-30-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing As To Both Defendants
Off Calendar Dec-08-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

David P. Adams, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, BANK OF THE WEST, A CALIFORNIA BANKING CORPORATION,
Order Granting Waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendants CHARLOTTE OUTDOOR DESIGN INC. and JEFFREY HORRELL ALSO KNOWN AS JEFFREY S. HORRELL,
Default of Defendants has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendants as follows:
Damages: $41,610.23
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $1828.25
Costs: $810.40
Total Judgment in the amount of $44,548.88

Plaintiff Bank of the West is to recover from Charlotte Outdoor Design Inc. and Jeffrey Horrell possession of the following described personal property: 2014 Tekeuchi S/N 123504204. If Bank of the West obtains possession of the described personal property, and sells it at a sale, Bank of the West shall apply the proceeds from any such sale, net of any sale and recovery of costs and expenses, to reduce the amount owed by Charlotte Outdoor Design, Inc. and Jeffrey Horrell under this Judgment after such sale has occurred.

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-10-2016 Continued To Jan-18-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
